description: arXiv:2607.13007v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Simulation-based algorithms are especially suited for high-uncertainty environments such as adversarial board games with significant elements of randomness and hidden information. In particular, several Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) variants are commonly used in such domains. In this paper, we propose a series of enhancements for Ensemble Determi...
author: Jakub Kowalski, Adam Ci\k{e}\.zkowski, Artur Krzy\.zy\'nski, Mark H. M. Winands
